prompt: Retrieve and compare appointments APT-6895 and APT-9895; report each name, appointment date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Nutrition follow-up for Jordan Kim (APT-6895) only, set the appointment date to 2026-11-20. Leave APT-9895 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for APT-6895: set the appointment date to 2026-12-24, not 2026-11-20. The other appointment must still remain untouched.

records.name: Nutrition follow-up for Jordan Kim archive

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first appointment date.
Replace the superseded appointment date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both appointment date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected appointment date as current and the first requested appointment date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
